examples: There's a porpoise close behind us, and he's treading on my tail.
One would have thought that Pinocchio had turned into a porpoise playing in the sun.
The finless porpoise prefer to live in shallow, warm waters like those of theYangtze River.
Charlie Phillips, of the Whale and Dolphin Conservation Society, said porpoise sightings had been reported.
Toni Collette plays Muriel, the shyest member of a bored and bulbous family living in Porpoise Spit.
